items.title: Show HN: Clawk – Give coding agents a disposable Linux VM, not your laptop
items.why_it_matters: Clawk provides a secure, disposable Linux VM for coding agents. Since you use Claude Code—which by default runs commands directly on your local laptop—running it inside an isolated VM protects your personal files and system settings from accidental AI mistakes. This week, clone the Clawk repository and run your next Claude Code session inside its isolated environment to safely let the AI execute terminal commands.

items.title: Claude Code plugin that plays a Mr. Meeseeks voice line whene Claude is waiting
items.why_it_matters: This is a simple utility that plays a Mr. Meeseeks voice line whenever Claude Code is waiting for your input. It is a practical quality-of-life upgrade that keeps you from constantly staring at a frozen terminal or losing focus while waiting for a task to finish. This week, install the script from the GitHub repository so you get an instant audio cue the moment Claude is ready for your next direction.
